name: seo-article-audit
description: Audit an AIHR article's search performance: pull Google Search Console query metrics and Ahrefs organic keywords for a single URL, run a content-gap analysis against intent-selected organic competitors, then output a static Excel workbook and Markdown analysis. Also bundles the article-diff-md skill for red/green diff-block Markdown files.

interface.longDescription: Pulls Google Search Console query data, Ahrefs keyword data, and page-level content-gap inputs for an AIHR article, then produces static workbook and Markdown analysis files.
defaultPrompt: Run SEO analysis for this URL
